heading: Power BI
subheading: Intuitive dashboards tailored to your KPIs sales, finance, operations, marketing, or forecasting.
content:
Trusted by over 300,000 organizations worldwide, [Power BI](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Microsoft_Power_BI) is Microsoft's leading business intelligence platform  -  deployed across 97% of Fortune 500 companies. A Forrester Total Economic Impact™ study commissioned by Microsoft found that a composite organization achieved over 366–406% ROI over three years, with payback in under six months. Iseyon helps organizations transform data analysis and reporting using Power BI, enabling enterprises to unify data, create interactive dashboards, and enhance decision-making through a scalable and collaborative platform.

Research institutions such as TDWI and [Stanford HAI ](https://hai.stanford.edu/)highlight the growing impact of self-service analytics and AI-driven decision support in modern enterprises.

> *"Self-service analytics platforms like Power BI democratize data access, enabling business users to answer questions independently — reducing analyst bottlenecks by over 50% in mature deployments." :Research Resources*

## **Dashboard Design & Analytics**

### **Interactive Dashboards & Reporting**

Iseyon designs and implements Power BI dashboards that provide a 360-degree view of business metrics. Users can explore data with natural language queries, leverage built-in and custom visuals, and create interactive reports that communicate insights effectively.

### **Data Connectivity**

Iseyon integrates Power BI with diverse data sources including Excel, Access, CSV files, Google Analytics, QuickBooks Online, Salesforce, [GitHub](https://github.com/), [MailChimp](https://mailchimp.com/), [SQL Server](https://www.microsoft.com/en-in/sql-server), and many more. With over 50 pre-built connectors, our solutions ensure seamless integration with enterprise applications.

### **Business Insights & Collaboration**

Iseyon Power BI implementations enable real-time dashboards accessible across devices. Business users can drill into underlying data, collaborate on insights, and make faster, more confident decisions with intuitive exploration tools.

## **Desktop, Service & Mobile**

### **Power BI Desktop**

Iseyon empowers analysts with Power BI Desktop, a feature-rich authoring tool for combining data from disparate databases, files, and web services. Automated data quality fixes and advanced wrangling capabilities ensure accurate, reliable reporting.

### **Power BI Service**

Iseyon help organizations securely publish reports to the Power BI service, set up automatic data refresh, and provide enterprise-wide access to the latest information. Reports and dashboards can be embedded into portals and applications for a unified analytics experience.

### **Mobile Access**

Iseyon enables mobile access to Power BI dashboards and reports, ensuring decision-makers can view real-time insights anywhere. Automatic updates keep data current across all devices.

### **Data Integration & Gateways**

Iseyon Power BI solutions connect both cloud and on-premises data sources. Using Power BI gateways, Iseyon integrates SQL Server databases, Analysis Services models, and other enterprise systems into unified dashboards.

### **Power BI vs. Leading BI Platforms: Capability Comparison**

Comparison based on Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and BI Platforms (2024) and vendor documentation:

| Capability / Metric                       | Tableau                               | Qlik Sense                      | Power BI (Premium)                             | Notes & Sources                                                                                                                          |
| ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Integration with Microsoft 365            | Limited native                        | Not native                      | Deep / Native                                  | Power BI integrates natively with Teams, SharePoint, Excel; Tableau/Qlik require custom connectors. General market knowledge.            |
| AI-Powered Insights / Augmented Analytics | Yes — Tableau Pulse, AI features      | Yes — AutoML & LLM capabilities | Yes — Copilot + Narrative AI & built-in AI     | Gartner MQ commentary notes advanced AI integration trends across leaders.                                                               |
| Mobile App Experience                     | Strong visualization                  | Good interactivit               | Highly rated mobile BI                         | User review sites and app stores rate Power BI mobile apps highly; specific official reviewer ratings exist (e.g., 4.7/5 on app stores). |
| Real-Time Data Capabilities               | Live query, real-time dashboards      | Near real-time analytics        | DirectQuery and Live capabilities              | Real-time features typically depend on licensing and connectors.                                                                         |
| Ecosystem / Integration                   | Salesforce ecosystem                  | Multi-cloud connectors          | Microsoft + Azure + Power Platform             | Power BI’s tight ecosystem integration is widely documented in ecosystem research.                                                       |
| Best Suited For                           | Advanced visualization & storytelling | Flexible explorative analytics  | Broad enterprise adoption & cost-effectiveness | Qualitative categorization based on MQ and market reviews.                                                                               |
homePageDescription: Iseyon builds interactive Power BI reports and dashboards for real-time visibility, monitoring, smarter decisions, and executive performance tracking.

faqs.question: What Power BI services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: Iseyon delivers end-to-end consulting services for Microsoft Power BI, including dashboard design, data integration, report development, governance setup, performance optimization, embedding, and enterprise deployment. We help organizations unify data, create interactive visualizations, and enable scalable, collaborative business intelligence environments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon design interactive dashboards and reports?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds dynamic dashboards that provide a 360-degree view of business performance. Users can explore insights using natural language queries, drill-down capabilities, and built-in or custom visuals. Our dashboards are designed to communicate insights clearly while supporting real-time, data-driven decision-making.

faqs.question: What data sources can Iseyon connect to Power BI?
faqs.answer: Iseyon enables analysts to use Power BI Desktop for advanced data modeling, transformation, and report creation. We then configure secure publishing to the Power BI Service, enabling automatic data refresh, enterprise-wide sharing, and report embedding into portals or applications.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support Power BI Desktop and Power BI Service?
faqs.answer: Iseyon enables analysts to use Power BI Desktop for advanced data modeling, transformation, and report creation. We then configure secure publishing to the Power BI Service, enabling automatic data refresh, enterprise-wide sharing, and report embedding into portals or applications.

faqs.question: Can Power BI dashboards be accessed on mobile devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon configures mobile-ready dashboards that are accessible across devices through the Power BI mobile apps. Decision-makers can securely view real-time insights, collaborate on reports, and access updated metrics anytime, anywhere.
